```{=html}
<div style="width:82%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;background:#1E1E2E;box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);">

  <div style="background:linear-gradient(180deg,#3A3950,#2A2940);padding:0.5em 0.9em;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;">
   <span style="width:0.55em;height:0.55em;border-radius:50%;background:#FF5F56;"></span>
   <span style="width:0.55em;height:0.55em;border-radius:50%;background:#FFBD2E;"></span>
   <span style="width:0.55em;height:0.55em;border-radius:50%;background:#27C93F;"></span>
   <span style="margin-left:0.5em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;">Claude Code</span>
  </div>

  <div style="padding:1.05em 1.3em 1.15em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.62em;line-height:1.85;text-align:left;color:#F8F7F0;">
   <div><span style="color:#3DA18A;">&gt;</span> <span style="background:rgba(86,84,162,0.3);color:#C4C3E8;font-weight:700;padding:0.05em 0.4em;border-radius:5px;">/ph-image</span> a banner for my new blog post on agentic skills</div>
   <div style="margin-top:0.6em;color:#5C6B80;">⎿ reading <span style="color:#FFB84D;">SKILL.md</span> · enhancing the prompt · calling the image API</div>
   <div style="margin-top:0.2em;color:#27C93F;">✓ banner.png · on-brand, 16:9, matches every other banner</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.9em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.55em;font-size:0.5em;color:#6F6470;line-height:1.5;">
  <i data-lucide="lightbulb" style="width:1.3em;height:1.3em;stroke-width:1.8;color:#137A6E;flex:none;"></i>
  <span>One short request in. A consistent, finished asset out. The hard part lives inside the skill.</span>
 </div>

</div>
```
